title: Composed Workflow
description: The adaptive workflow composed for a specific intent. Persisted at workflow.json in the intent directory.

maxReviewIterations.description: Maximum number of owner→reviewer cycles before the reviewer is bypassed and the human becomes the quality gate. Applies globally to all stages.

stages.description: Ordered list of stages to execute

stage.description: Stage name (must match a stage directory under stages/)

owner.description: Persona assigned as owner for this stage

unit.description: Unit name for construction-phase stage instances. Absent for inception stages.

phase.description: Workflow phase used to locate the stage directory.

reviewer.description: Persona assigned as final reviewer. Optional; absent when this stage has no reviewer.

rationale.description: Why this stage was included (or why it was ordered here)

skipped.description: If true, this stage was considered but explicitly skipped

skip-reason.description: Why the stage was skipped (only when skipped: true)

autonomy.description: Per-stage autonomy mode. 'supervised' = human answers questions AND reviews artifact. 'guided' = human answers questions but artifact auto-approves. 'full' = no human involvement, AI self-answers and auto-approves.
